overview: A real-time autonomous traffic intelligence platform that simulates, predicts, and responds to both routine and edge-case traffic conditions using AI-driven decision making. Features a command-center style dashboard with live maps, anomaly detection, adaptive rerouting, emergency response, incident reporting, weather intelligence, and system health monitoring — all powered by procedural simulation refreshing every 5 seconds.
features: Live traffic map with color-coded High/Medium/Low congestion across city districts updating every 5 seconds
Anomaly detection panel for accidents, pedestrians, obstacles, and animals with severity filtering
Adaptive rerouting engine with explainable AI reasoning for alternative paths
Emergency response dashboard with signal grid simulation and priority vehicle detection
Crowd-sourced incident reporting with AI validation scoring
Weather intelligence panel showing real-time conditions and route impact
System health monitor with component uptime tracking and predictive wait times
Predictive wait time estimates per intersection with weather-adjusted calculations
